item.title: Mountain Cat.
item.dc:creator: BluesFish

item.title: FYI
item.description: Somewhat related... I'm deaf and some times people try to bother me by yelling nonsensical stuff or laughing really loudly near me. However, I cannot hear what they are saying and I feel that thanks to technology I have the advantage to be very selective with what I listen to. I hope everyone had this power. I guess if I could hear without an aid I'll always go for beautiful music, lovely birds singing or someone's beating heart as I already do. Mean people should use their lives for better purposes. ♥
item.dc:creator: Tonfantomeprefere

item.title: It's time for a Funny Friday dump! Let's end the week with some laughs
item.description:
Search your feelings, you know it to be true! As usual, there's a link to a private album with some of the dirtier stuff in the comments, so if you want to see that make sure you look in the comments. And let me know if you want to be notified when I put out these collections, I'll add you to my ping list.
The belt on his trunks takes this to another level
Honestly, that's probably for the best. Why take the chance?
Start doing this right after the New Year if you want to get REALLY dirty looks.
Monster girl waifus are a great investment for modern dungeon traps.
He's got to get a point for quick thinking at least.
For Gondor!
If you take out an appendix you lose so much context!
The happiest couple
Okay, this is going up on my list of best "Yo momma" jokes.
"I've made a terrible mistake" - Quark, probably
Another ghost going into containment
It's always the square hole
Shoutout to @DarthFutuza, who shared this as a comment to another post of mine. https://imgur.com/gallery/AT3529r
Yeah, I'd return Peach too if I was in Bowser's shoes.
I can only wonder what's going to happen when Timmy falls down the well.
Damn that Uno Reverse card...
I bet some people will be saying "Oh yes!"
Just don't mess with his rug. It really ties the room together.
"This is worthless." "Less than worthless!"
We all know how that moment just builds and builds to crescendo until it explodes...
Show respect to the gods or pay the price.
The power of Bacchus compels her! (Bacchus is the Roman name for Dionysus)
That's a shitload of emotional damage
If you liked this, see this: https://youtu.be/2YwC4Vsm5h0?si=Z9gIcyPCiYPo90p0
Say no more, girl.
That pawn is FUCKED
This might be the classiest Your mom joke I've ever come across. (Although less fun than coming across your mom)
The sad thing is, I've had a couple of bosses that I can picture doing this.
All dog owners know that feeling of seeing your dog head right for some mud after a grooming
Sounds like an electrifying story!
Eh, this joke didn't split my sides, but it was fine, man
Granny was level grinding and raising her stats before your dad was even born, girl.
Perfectly imbalanced
This kid will do well when they have to untie knots
One of the all time great pranks
The worms will be clueless with the Monty Python crew
Brainy's head will look good on Mystique's waist
Harsh but deserved. Who chooses the name Newt?!
My dog crossed the rainbow bridge last year, so this is the closest thing you get to a dog tax. I feel so bad for this poor confused pup. Hope you have a good Friday and a great weekend.
item.dc:creator: PoliticalWanderer

item.title: UPDATE: Aaron has been found. He is no longer with us
item.description: Front page edit: Thank you for all the kind words. Obviously, the state in which he was found was the worst possible outcome. My focus now is to be there for my best friend and their family, and to also offer a safe space for others to contact me when they're feeling low. That being said, my inbox is open to anyone struggling with their mental health. Aaron was a part of the LGBTQ community (a particularly vulnerable demographic in our country) and had also dealt with severe depression and possibly bipolar disorder (although I'm not sure if he was ever officially diagnosed with the latter). I'm not a MH professional, but I AM a really good listener. I'm also no stranger to grief. I lost my best friend to a motorcycle accident in 2020, and my 20 year old nephew also to suicide last spring. Suicide is never the answer--no matter how hopeless you feel. I will continue to be an ally and fight for equal rights, and I will continue to work toward better mental health care in this dystopian hellscape of a country. - B Update to my viral post about my friend Aaron who went missing a week ago in Las Vegas. He was found late this afternoon deceased in a Nevada public park. Cause of death self-induced asphyxiation. His family is aware. Please, I beg of you, if you are having suicidal thoughts or ideations, or are even struggling with anxiety and depression, reach out to someone. Call the suicide and crisis lifeline at 988. Phone a friend or a loved one. You are needed here. You are wanted, and you are loved.
item.dc:creator: 7ofNein

item.title: State of the housing market
item.description: We loved the place. We applied for it and even (unfortunately) had to partake in a bidding war. Unfortunately at the last minute a corp came in and just blew up everyone's offers. How are we ever supposed to have a place to call our own? The housing situation in Canada is horrible.

item.title: Giving hundreds of millions to charity is obviously bad and she should stop immediately?
item.description: Giving money away to charities is definitely a bad idea because she can’t give them all infinite money, infinitely? What the fuck kinda Besos-loving, conservative bullshit, fuck-the-poor, money hoarding garbage hot take shit is this, Fortune? They should change their name to Burn The Poors For Warmth Magazine FFS. Rant over

item.title: Images of Note: this machine surrounds hate and forces it to surrender
item.description:
OK so my question is this: Where on the Water of Leith can you actually do that because the nearest point to the Water of Leith to the Zoo is really narrow and shallow and behind a lot of weirs, also how the fuck do you take animals from the zoo and take them like one mile to the Water of Leith and do it surreptitiously.
Yeah that sounds like a cat
:)
bollards
a l f
Kronk is best Disney Prince.
Now I wanna do this, but with a shit post.
GAY SUN. GAY SUN.
CHUNKY STEW IS NOT BANISHMENT
TAKE ME TO FURCH
(I ship them)
Harvey is giving off Luigi vibes. Omg I get it now.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also Streaming tonight. We gonna SAVE LEO!!!: http://twitch.abbii.gay

item.title: Friday dump
item.dc:creator: Ragga001

item.title: My frontal cortex can predict the future
item.description: I decided to use a new skillet I bought a long time ago. I cleaned the top and placed it on the stove. I did not realize it had a very thin piece of cardboard on the bottom advertising it (and in my idiotic defense, it was colored to match the bottom of the skillet). I wanted to let it heat up until suddenly a flame creeped out from underneath. So fucking glad I bought the extinguisher.
item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: Be kind. It's not difficult.
item.dc:creator: DrQui

item.title: TheFreePizzaDude is back!!!
item.description:
Hi everyone, I'm MrPuckett and TheFreePizzaDude Welcome to the very first post from sunny Minneapolis!
The past couple weeks I've been busy moving my family across county, super thankful to all the Angels who kept this project running Now that we're all settled in, let's send some food to Imgurians in need
People in need request food by leaving a comment People who want to help reply to that comment, send a DM and get them set up with food If you have any issues or if you send food - let me know!
You can also contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
Nanna Pants is here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post until 7pm central
13,169 meals since we started 808 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going from Minnesota! ... 130 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 147 5th, 6th and 7th by Pizza Angel @BadPunsAplenty 310 8th, 9th, 10th and 11th by @OP 340 12th and 13th by Pizza Angel @BadPunsAplenty 400 14th, 15th, 16th and 17th by @OP 410 17th by Pizza Angel @AyatollahBahloni 415 18th by Pizza Angel @sunnymonkey 430 19th and 20th by Pizza Angel @HelaSisterOfThor 435 21st by Pizza Angel @AmIEveElle 440 22nd and Michael Jordan by Pizza Angel @BadPunsAPlenty 445 Kobe Bryant and 25th by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 515 26th, 27th and 28th by Pizza Angel @WhitecarRingingInAClocktower 530 29th, 30th and 31st by Pizza Angel @IMPICKLERICK 615 32nd, 33rd, 34th and 35th by @OP 620 36th and 37th by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 625 38th by Pizza Angel @AmIEveElle 640 39th, 40th, 41st and The Meaning of Life, the Universe and Everything by @OP ... Alright everyone that's it for @OP Today we sent out 42 meals That's 13,212 meals since we started 808 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude
